last_updated_note: Phase 14 — Asset / Widget Map landed (cross-page widget catalog + API → page mapping)
current_phase: Client Boxes + Automation Safety Hardening — Ledger system buildout (Phases 1–5 complete; first ledger steward automation active)
core_principles: The repo is not just code. The repo is the memory of the build.
If it matters to future work, it belongs in the versioned file tree.
The plan is not truth. The box is truth.
If the system changed, the system memory changes with it.

major_systems.name: Client Boxes
major_systems.role: canonical per-client memory and operating substrate

major_systems.name: Inbox Guardrails
major_systems.role: safety contract for sends and Close inbox work

major_systems.name: Ledgers
major_systems.phase: Phases 1–5 — Global + Temporal Continuity + North Star + File Directory + Open Problems landed; global_ledger_steward automation active

major_systems.name: Bedrock (CCAgentindex)
major_systems.role: the only filesystem state the app owns

major_systems.name: Pieces Memory Backend
major_systems.role: local memory and recall via PiecesOS MCP

global_rules: Do not treat generated state as canonical unless marked.
Do not let plans override guardrails.
Risky automation moves require explicit approval.
If a client replies, their plan is stale until reviewed.
If a page or data binding changes, update page_asset_sitemap.md.
If project state changes, update the relevant ledger.
If a local directory has a Box, read it before editing there.
If a problem is found but not fixed, record it.
If a decision is made, record it.
If a change would confuse a future agent, leave a handoff note.
Never invent paths. Use canonical paths from CLAUDE.md and the Global Ledger.
Never invent fields. Read a sibling schema before creating a new bedrock entry.
Never write through the Auto/ alias unless the team explicitly asks.

active_workstreams.summary: Make each client box safe, current, and usable by automation. One box at a time.
milestones: 2026-04-28: all 28 boxes have full Close.com verbatim comms + raw payloads

Create global and local memory layers for durable project continuity.

active_workstreams.summary: Boxes UI accurately reflects source Client Boxes and their safety state.

active_workstreams.summary: Every send passes the guardrail contract before leaving the system.

active_risks.summary: Batch approval can hide high-risk moves (fee waivers, discounts, scope promises). These need isolated approval cards.
Some seven-day plans predate guardrail enforcement and may carry unsafe executable copy.
active_risks.rule: If plan and guardrail conflict, the guardrail wins.

active_risks.summary: Any meaningful inbound from a client can invalidate the existing seven-day plan.
Profiles/enrichment may carry useful internal strategy but customer-facing copy must only use facts from comms or explicit approval.
Working tree currently dirty (modified pieces_sweeps.jsonl + untracked Flávia Benson .txt). Always git status before direct GitHub writes.
Auto/ is a symlink to the team's standalone automation folder. Writing through it requires explicit team authorization.
PiecesOS sessions can expire silently. Server retries automatically; restart server.py if persistent.

source_of_truth_rules.github: Durable source of truth for project memory, ledgers, code, configs.
source_of_truth_rules.local_tree: Working copy. May contain unpushed work. Always check git status.
client_boxes_priority: 04_profile.md and *_enrichment.md (internal strategy only — not customer-facing truth)
source_of_truth_rules.generated_outputs: Views, not primary truth, unless explicitly marked canonical.
source_of_truth_rules.plans: Strategy drafts. Subordinate to comms, state, guardrails, replies, approvals.
source_of_truth_rules.ui_pages: Render truth, do not define it.
source_of_truth_rules.page_asset_sitemap: page_asset_sitemap.md is the UI Done Gate. Required update for any page/route/binding change.

ledger_index.scope: Universal trust ordering + per-domain trust orderings + Allowed-To-Know schema (4-bucket) + conflict resolution + update protocol. First ledger authored under DEC-2026-04-29-013 envelope-aware rule; tier: global.
Universal Done Gate + 11 work-type gates + Ledger Update Matrix + 55/45 build rhythm
Defines what a Box is project-wide. Subsumes the planned Directory Configuration Ledger.
Reactive Box Network architecture — manifest schema + envelope + 3 routing tiers + 3 interpreter tiers + cycle policy. Runtime deferred to Phase C per DEC-2026-04-29-013.
Runnable app agent for scoped Global Ledger maintenance sweeps
External-system inventory + per-service contracts (credentials/failure modes/verification/billing/fallback). First DOMAIN-tier ledger. Closed PROB-2026-04-28-009.

ledger_index.removal_reason: covered by Open Problems / Decisions / Communications / per-Box ledgers (DEC-2026-04-29-004)

ledger_index.scope: Per-file role inventory — ~78 entries across 10 categories.
Cross-page widget catalog + API→page mapping + shared services + cross-page state. Tier: domain.
